title: Expand Games to 100 entries and Movies & TV to 100 entries

requirements.text: Expand the backend hardcoded games array in backend/main.mo to at least 100 total game entries. Include a wide variety of genres (action, puzzle, arcade, racing, strategy, IO, platformer, sports, shooter, idle, etc.). Each entry must have title, description, embedUrl (publicly accessible iframe/embed URL), and thumbnailUrl fields. Retain all existing game entries and add new ones to reach the 100-game target. Use publicly accessible embed URLs from sources like CrazyGames, Poki, itch.io, or direct game hosting URLs.

quotes: Add more games i atleast want 100 games
I'll expand the Games section to 100 entries

acceptanceCriteria: The backend games array contains at least 100 entries
All entries have non-empty title, description, embedUrl, and thumbnailUrl fields
Games span at least 8 distinct genres/categories
All existing game entries are retained
New embed URLs are publicly accessible iframe-compatible URLs

requirements.text: Expand the backend hardcoded shows array in backend/main.mo to at least 100 total show/movie entries. Include a wide variety of genres (drama, comedy, action, thriller, sci-fi, anime, documentary, horror, romance, crime, fantasy, etc.) and a mix of TV shows and movies. Each entry must have title, description, embedUrl (YouTube trailer embed URL in the format https://www.youtube.com/embed/<videoId>), and thumbnailUrl fields. Retain all existing show entries and add new ones to reach the 100-entry target.
acceptanceCriteria: The backend shows array contains at least 100 entries
All entries have non-empty title, description, embedUrl, and thumbnailUrl fields
Shows/movies span at least 8 distinct genres
All existing show entries are retained
embedUrl values follow the YouTube embed format https://www.youtube.com/embed/<videoId>
A mix of TV shows and movies is represented

requirements.text: Update GamesSection.tsx to handle and display the expanded list of 100 games. Update the hardcoded fallback games array in GamesSection.tsx to mirror the full 100-game backend list. Ensure the responsive grid layout renders correctly with the larger dataset — consider adding a search/filter input or genre filter badges so users can browse the large catalog. The existing GamePlayer modal must remain functional for all game entries.

quotes: Add more games i atleast want 100 games

acceptanceCriteria: GamesSection displays all 100 game entries in the responsive grid
The fallback hardcoded list in GamesSection.tsx contains at least 100 games matching the backend data
A search or genre filter UI element is present to help browse 100+ games
Clicking Play Now on any game opens the GamePlayer modal with the correct embed URL
Grid layout remains visually consistent with the existing neon blue EDUrocks theme
No game cards overflow or break the layout

requirements.text: Update ShowsSection.tsx to handle and display the expanded list of 100 shows/movies. Update the hardcoded fallback shows array in ShowsSection.tsx to mirror the full 100-entry backend list. Ensure the responsive grid layout renders correctly with the larger dataset — consider adding a search/filter input or genre filter badges. The existing VideoPlayer modal must remain functional for all show/movie entries.
acceptanceCriteria: ShowsSection displays all 100 show/movie entries in the responsive grid
The fallback hardcoded list in ShowsSection.tsx contains at least 100 entries matching the backend data
A search or genre filter UI element is present to help browse 100+ titles
Clicking Watch Now on any entry opens the VideoPlayer modal with the correct YouTube embed URL
Grid layout remains visually consistent with the existing neon blue EDUrocks theme
No show cards overflow or break the layout

constraints: All embed URLs for games must be publicly accessible and iframe-compatible
All show/movie embed URLs must use the YouTube embed format (https://www.youtube.com/embed/<videoId>)
Retain all existing game and show entries — only add new ones
Do not modify any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
Maintain the existing neon blue EDUrocks dark theme throughout all UI changes
The GamePlayer and VideoPlayer modals must remain intact and functional
nonGoals: Changing the site's visual theme or color scheme
Adding or removing any of the 7 existing site sections
Modifying the Navigation, HeroSection, or SectionCardGrid beyond what is needed for the content expansion
Adding user authentication or personalization features
Implementing backend pagination or search — frontend-side filtering is sufficient
